item.title: Exploring the efficacy and future prospects of nutritional and dietary therapies in Crohn's disease.
item.description: Expert review of gastroenterology & hepatology - Review - Nutritional therapy has progressed from supportive care to a targeted strategy in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), particularly Crohn's disease (CD). Exclusive enteral nutrition (EEN) is firmly es...

item.title: SD in IBD: Does Advanced Therapy Improve Sexual Dysfunction in Patients with Inflammatory Bowel Disease?
Association Between Exposure to Air Pollutant Mixture and Risk of Inflammatory Bowel Disease: Modifying Effects of Healthy Lifestyle and Residential Greenspace.
item.description: Toxics - Background: Although air pollution is increasingly considered an environmental hazard for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), existing evidence predominantly relies on single-pollutant models that fa...
